assessment_objectives.objective: Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) are prevented from generating content that is inappropriate.
Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) are prevented from generating content that is harmful.
Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) are prevented from generating content that is false.
Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) are prevented from generating content that is illegal.
Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) are prevented from generating content that is violent.
